---
title: "Week 16: Remote Work Week"
subtitle: "Final Project Assembly"
date: "2026-12-08"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    colorlinks: true
---

## This Week

No class meetings. No new readings. This entire week is dedicated to assembling, rendering, and publishing your final portfolio. Use the time wisely --- everything is due next week.

---

## Work Week Checklist

Use this checklist to track your progress:

- [ ] **Finalize all six sections** of your Quarto Book project (Introduction, Literature Review, Method, Results, Discussion, References)
- [ ] **Render frequently** to catch errors early --- do not wait until the last day
- [ ] **Push to GitHub** and enable GitHub Pages (Settings > Pages > Source: main branch, /docs folder)
- [ ] **Test your live URL** in a private/incognito browser window to confirm it loads correctly
- [ ] **Delete all instruction comments** from your `.qmd` files (anything marked `<!-- ... -->`)
- [ ] **Check figure captions,** table labels, and in-text citations
- [ ] **Verify your references.bib** includes every source you cite and no extras
- [ ] **Rename your PDF** to `Lastname_FinalPortfolio.pdf` before uploading to Blackboard

---

## Common Render Errors

If your project fails to render, check this table first:

| Error Message | Likely Cause | Fix |
|---------------|-------------|-----|
| `object 'x' not found` | A variable name is misspelled or the code chunk that creates it did not run | Check spelling; make sure chunks run in order from top to bottom |
| `cannot open file 'coding_data_clean.RDS'` | The RDS file is not in the project folder | Copy `coding_data_clean.RDS` into the root of your project directory |
| `citation 'key' not found` | The citation key in your text does not match any entry in `references.bib` | Open `references.bib` and confirm the key exists exactly as typed |
| `apa.csl not found` | The CSL file is missing from the project folder | Download `apa.csl` from the course website or Zotero Style Repository and place it in the project root |
| `there is no package called 'x'` | A required package is not installed | Run `install.packages("x")` in the RStudio console |

---

## Getting Help

Dr. Leith is available by email and Discord all week. Do not wait until Friday night to troubleshoot render errors.

- **Course website:** [Open Methods Hub](https://sim-lab-siue.github.io/liaison-program/) --- check here first
- **Email:** aleith@siue.edu (allow 24 hours Mon--Fri)
- **Office hours:** MW 10:00--11:30 AM and 1:30--3:00 PM, Dunham Hall 1017 (available remotely by appointment)
- **Discord:** APLeith
